issues.description: Card has protective/replacement effect text but effects array is empty. Must define: OnKO trigger with condition checking for [Bonk Punch] character, action to trash this card instead of letting character be KO'd
effectText field is missing; should contain the full card ability text for reference

suggestedDsl.effectText: If your Character [Bonk Punch] would be K.O.'d by an effect, you may trash this Character instead.
